channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lakers, Clippers return to their home courts after days of fire devastation across Los Angeles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Lakers and the Clippers both went back to work Monday night in Los Angeles' first two NBA games since catastrophic wildfires killed at least 24 people and destroyed significant sections of their hometown.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mike McCarthy won't return as the Cowboys' coach. Deion Sanders could be a candidate to replace him
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy will not return as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, owner Jerry Jones said Monday. Jones said the organization and McCarthy mutually agreed to part ways.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bay Area Olympian Lily Zhang shows skills in Pleasanton table tennis tournament
item.description: The Blasters on Friday lost to the Princeton Revolution from New Jersey, beat the Carolina Gold Rush on Saturday and wrapped up the weekend with a loss to the Texas Smash.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Martin, The Mercury News

item.title: Saquon Barkley's leadership missed in New York
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- I think I appreciate Saquon Barkley more now than I ever did as a Giant, and sadly probably the Giants do too. There is no question the Giants miss his leadership in the locker room. They also miss the dynamic playmaker that he is on offense.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Cubs sign former Brewers starting pitcher to one-year deal
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have signed former Milwaukee Brewers starting pitcher Colin Rea to a new contract for the 2025 MLB season, while the Cubs have designated RHP Michael Arias for assignment to make room for Rea on the 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: For SF Giants’ Justin Verlander, passion to pitch still burns bright
item.description: Verlander, who will turn 42 by Opening Day, believes changes to his offseason routine will lead to more success
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Minnesota earns 1st women's AP Top 25 ranking since 2019. UCLA, South Carolina, Notre Dame still 1-3
item.description: Minnesota is off to its best start in 17 games and earned its first ranking since 2019 on Monday, entering The Associated Press women's basketball poll at No. 24. The Golden Gophers have won 16 of their first 17 contests, with the loss coming against Nebraska last month.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coco Gauff delivers 6-word message for those dealing with LA wildfires after Australian Open win
item.description: American tennis star Coco Gauff had a message for those in Los Angeles dealing with the devastating wildfires as she defeated Sofia Kenin in the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nick Taylor comes through in the clutch. Now he wants more chances to be there
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — Nick Taylor never looked more clutch than when he birdied the 18th hole three times in the WM Phoenix Open, first to force a playoff and the last to win it. And then he went 23 starts over 11 months without a top 10.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLB Players Trust hosts clinic for little leaguers
item.description: The rookies and baseball pros were all smiles during a special clinic to give back to the community and those affected by last year's hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Brew, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texans get 2 points on blocked extra point return vs. Chargers, 1st in NFL playoff history
item.description: Houston's D'Angelo Ross returned a blocked extra point for two points in the fourth quarter of the Texans' wild-card playoff victory over the Los Angeles Chargers on Saturday — the first such play in NFL postseason history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NBA postpones Rockets vs. Hawks game because of winter storm
item.description: The game between the Houston Rockets and Atlanta Hawks scheduled for Saturday has been postponed because of a winter storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago plays Edmonton following Teravainen's 2-goal performance
item.description: Edmonton Oilers (25-13-3, in the Pacific Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (14-26-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 7 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hayton scores dramatic goal in 2-1 win over San Jose
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Barrett Hayton scored with 1:32 remaining in regulation to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 win against the San Jose Sharks at Delta Center on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Rams' playoff game moved to Arizona as wildfires disrupt sports in Southern California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NFL moved the Los Angeles Rams’ playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings out of Southern California on Thursday, the biggest of several changes to the sports calendar after days of devastating wildfires in the area.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bulls fall to Pacers, 2-game winning streak snapped as longest homestand of season begins
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Bulls were looking to go into their longest homestand of the season on a three-game winning streak. Instead, they'll be trying to start a new one.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Athletics agree to $60M, 5-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, AP source says
item.description: (AP) -- The Athletics have agreed to a $60 million, five-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Monday night. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4
